---
title: "Semantic Promotion Ladder"
---

# Semantic Promotion Ladder

The grimoire keeps generated-draft vocabulary visible while moving entries into reviewed and canonical status through explicit gates. This is a promotion pipeline, not a shrink pass.

## Summary

- Total entries: `1645`
- Generated drafts: `1135`
- Reviewed or canonical: `510`
- Fully reviewed houses: `2`
- First target reviewed count: `450`

## Promotion Gates

Generated draft to reviewed:

- no generated-template summary or force
- term-specific shadow
- at least one prompt-use clause
- at least one concrete example clause
- sense disambiguation for overloaded terms

Reviewed to canonical:

- used by a spell, stack, benchmark, or accepted external report
- stable across at least one release
- no unresolved canon-correction issue

## House Review Board

| House                                                          | Total | Generated Draft | Reviewed | Canonical | Status         | Next Tranche                                                     |
| -------------------------------------------------------------- | ----- | --------------- | -------- | --------- | -------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Architecture, Abstraction, and Design                          | 112   | 0               | 112      | 0         | fully reviewed | complete                                                         |
| Language, Semantics, and Formal Shape                          | 137   | 0               | 137      | 0         | fully reviewed | complete                                                         |
| Data, State, and Representation                                | 122   | 104             | 18       | 0         | in progress    | review generated_draft entries with prompt-use and example gates |
| Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs                  | 140   | 120             | 20       | 0         | in progress    | review generated_draft entries with prompt-use and example gates |
| Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic                 | 97    | 79              | 18       | 0         | in progress    | review generated_draft entries with prompt-use and example gates |
| Runtime, Memory, and Execution                                 | 76    | 62              | 14       | 0         | in progress    | review generated_draft entries with prompt-use and example gates |
| Systems Programming and Operating-System Words                 | 86    | 74              | 12       | 0         | in progress    | review generated_draft entries with prompt-use and example gates |
| Networking and Distributed Systems                             | 116   | 96              | 20       | 0         | in progress    | review generated_draft entries with prompt-use and example gates |
| Databases, Persistence, and Time-Binding Words                 | 82    | 66              | 16       | 0         | in progress    | review generated_draft entries with prompt-use and example gates |
| Security, Trust, and Warding Words                             | 95    | 77              | 18       | 0         | in progress    | review generated_draft entries with prompt-use and example gates |
| Build, Tooling, Versioning, and Release                        | 76    | 60              | 16       | 0         | in progress    | review generated_draft entries with prompt-use and example gates |
| Testing, Verification, and Observability                       | 71    | 55              | 16       | 0         | in progress    | review generated_draft entries with prompt-use and example gates |
| Hardware, Embedded, and Performance-Near Words                 | 80    | 66              | 14       | 0         | in progress    | review generated_draft entries with prompt-use and example gates |
| Interface, UX, and Human-Facing Words                          | 60    | 50              | 10       | 0         | in progress    | review generated_draft entries with prompt-use and example gates |
| Promptcraft, AI-Oriented Engineering, and Spell Structure      | 70    | 56              | 14       | 0         | in progress    | review generated_draft entries with prompt-use and example gates |
| Guarantee Words, Quality Attributes, and Behavioral Adjectives | 92    | 73              | 19       | 0         | in progress    | review generated_draft entries with prompt-use and example gates |
| Failure Words, Pathologies, and Counter-Spells                 | 70    | 50              | 20       | 0         | in progress    | review generated_draft entries with prompt-use and example gates |
| Compound Forms, Prefixes, Suffixes, and Naming Runes           | 63    | 47              | 16       | 0         | in progress    | review generated_draft entries with prompt-use and example gates |
